title: About Me
bio: I care about finding the right balance between security and user experience. I value the team moving in the same direction over individual performance, and when I hit a problem, I try not to default to the familiar solution.

principles.balance: A feature without security is meaningless, and security that's too inconvenient won't be used. I look for the point where neither has to be sacrificed.
principles.communication: I try to understand intent and context before methodology. Even with the same goal, people express it differently — so I figure out the background before deciding on an approach.
principles.teamwork: Clear goals reduce unnecessary confusion. I think aligning the team's direction is actually the fastest way forward.
principles.growth: New technologies are tools, not goals. If something can solve the problem, I'm willing to try unfamiliar approaches.
